title: ferray-io: no bounds check on shape product overflow from untrusted .npy files (DoS)

Actual: 

npy/mod.rs L112,144 + memmap.rs L134,139,182: shape.iter().product() can overflow silently. Crafted files cause OOM or corrupted arrays. Fix: use checked_mul.
